examples: Historically, Algol 68 is a good historic example for this kind of pitfall.
This paper proposes an HLLCA, which directly executes vector-ALGOL 60 language.
A programming language based on ALGOL and designed for non numeric manipulation of mathematical expressions.
In addition, star colour is simulated for noticeably red, blue and yellow stars, along with the changing brightness of three variable stars Algol, Mira and Delta Cephei.
